errors.description: The Merkle checkpoint is missing canonical evidence-chain leaf hashes.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint verification until leaf hashes are present

errors.description: The Merkle checkpoint chain range is malformed or outside the evidence chain.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint verification until chain range is valid

errors.description: The Merkle checkpoint root or checkpoint ID does not match canonical leaf hashing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint verification until Merkle root integrity is proven

errors.description: The Merkle checkpoint or leaf set was replayed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint verification because replayed checkpoint evidence was detected

errors.description: The Merkle checkpoint does not bind to the expected evidence-chain head.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint verification until chain-head binding is proven

errors.description: The Merkle checkpoint contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint verification until no secrets or raw approvals are present
